name: Your New Girlfriend Has A Secret
description:
Your new girlfriend has been keeping a secret from you, it's been one month and you still haven't been... intimate... together.

¥~~~~~+~~~~~¥~~~~~+~~~~~¥

Creator's Notes:

Note #1: This bot was based off of another bot that I felt told a decent story but has some seriously... well, I don't want to say dumb... but fantastical elements that I feel distracted from the story. So I decided to do my own version.

Note #2: If you leave a like or dislike without a review, I will delete it. I would like genuine feed back, not just random thumbs.

Note #3: I test my bots in JLLM and sometimes have secrets in the bots that can spoil them. So I don't use proxy, and I won't be turning on Proxy.

¥~~~~~+~~~~~¥~~~~~+~~~~~¥

Update #1: I added something that I hope will make her less likely to reveal her secret in just a couple of messages. But most LLM's don't handle hiding secret info very well.

¥~~~~~+~~~~~¥~~~~~+~~~~~¥

Someone apparently thinks this is a 'kid' so I added an extra pick below.

¥~~~~~+~~~~~¥~~~~~+~~~~~¥

Still look like a 'kid' to anyone? Because she looks like a petite adult to me.
creator: CallMeMJ
